mapper.select: SELECT id, name, duration_days, price, description, active FROM ai_ticket_plans WHERE active = true ORDER BY duration_days ASC, price ASC, id ASC
SELECT id, name, duration_days, price, description, active FROM ai_ticket_plans WHERE id = #{planId}

SELECT s.id, s.host_id, s.plan_id, p.name AS plan_name, s.paid_price, s.started_at, s.expired_at, s.status, s.created_at, s.updated_at FROM ai_ticket_subscriptions s JOIN ai_ticket_plans p ON p.id = s.plan_id WHERE s.host_id = #{hostId} AND s.status = 'ACTIVE' AND s.started_at <= now() AND s.expired_at > now() ORDER BY s.expired_at DESC, s.id DESC LIMIT 1

SELECT s.id, s.host_id, s.plan_id, p.name AS plan_name, s.paid_price, s.started_at, s.expired_at, s.status, s.created_at, s.updated_at FROM ai_ticket_subscriptions s JOIN ai_ticket_plans p ON p.id = s.plan_id WHERE s.host_id = #{hostId} AND s.status = 'ACTIVE' AND s.started_at <= now() AND s.expired_at > now() ORDER BY s.expired_at DESC, s.id DESC LIMIT 1 FOR UPDATE OF s
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO ai_ticket_subscriptions ( host_id, plan_id, paid_price, started_at, expired_at, status ) VALUES ( #{hostId}, #{planId}, #{paidPrice}, #{startedAt}, #{expiredAt}, #{status} )

WITH expired_subscriptions AS ( UPDATE ai_ticket_subscriptions SET status = 'EXPIRED', updated_at = CURRENT_TIMESTAMP WHERE status = 'ACTIVE' AND expired_at <= now() RETURNING id, host_id ) INSERT INTO ai_tickets ( host_id, subscription_id, type ) SELECT host_id, id, 'EXPIRE' FROM expired_subscriptions
